description: Style NoteIt's not only women who like to experiment with the shape, styles and colours of their footwear as men are not far behind. Check out shoes for men from globalite. Globalite offers casual shoes in different styles which can go well with any outfit. Team these shoes with denims and a stylish tee to up your style quotient.Product DetailsGrey shoe with mesh upper, central lace-ups, suede and synthetic overlays and reinforced overlay at the heel counterPadded tongue and inner Foamy rubber outsoleNon marking compound outsole with textured grooves at the peripheryMaterial and CareMesh, suede, synthetic, Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
